task_objective: Refactor Ludusavi discovery logic into pyludusavi and simplify sdh_ludusavi adapter
design_decisions: Moved raw binary discovery logic to pyludusavi to improve library autonomy.
Automatically trigger discovery in Ludusavi constructor if flatpak_id is provided.
Updated run.sh to include py_modules in PYTHONPATH for consistent type checking against local package versions.
results: Discovery logic is now consolidated in the library, and the plugin's backend is simpler and more maintainable. All tests pass and type checks are green.
